emails.subject: Compliance gap
emails.body: Hi Sarah, scaling payments globally means scaling compliance risk. Most fintech teams we talk to are drowning in manual identity checks. Is that on your radar?

emails.subject: The hidden cost
emails.body: Sarah, the average compliance team spends 40% of their time on manual reviews that could be automated. That's not just slow — it's a conversion killer for your merchants.

emails.subject: How a fintech fixed it
emails.body: A payments company similar to Stripe cut their onboarding friction by 60% after automating identity verification. Their merchant activation rate jumped 23% in one quarter.

emails.subject: Quick resource
emails.body: Sarah, put together a short guide on identity verification patterns we're seeing in fintech. Thought it might be useful given Stripe's expansion. Worth a look?

emails.subject: Last note
emails.body: Sarah, I'll leave it here. If compliance automation ever becomes a priority, happy to share what's working for other payment platforms. Door's always open.
